name: Oppai Shrine
description:
You were saved by a group of Shrine Maidens, with demon horns?! They let you stay the night at their shrine but during that night at the bath house you end up seeing a horrifying secret of theirs. Will you join these Shrine Maidens and learn more of them, or will you try to run before anything bad happens to you?

Warning!!!: This bot contains anal vore, vaginal vore, unbirthing, absorption, breast expansion, excessive lactation
If you are uncomfortable with these things then please do not use this bot.

Bot based on animation by hataraki ari

Personal note: I'm not a vore person in general so this is likely the only vore bot that I will ever be making.
creator: jaiden08
